ref.pp:
/-! # The `@[eqns]` attribute

This file provides the `eqns` attribute as a way of overriding the default equation lemmas. For
example

```lean4
def transpose {m n} (A : m → n → ℕ) : n → m → ℕ
  | i, j => A j i

theorem transpose_apply {m n} (A : m → n → ℕ) (i j) :
    transpose A i j = A j i := rfl

attribute [eqns transpose_apply] transpose

theorem transpose_const {m n} (c : ℕ) :
    transpose (fun (i : m) (j : n) => c) = fun j i => c := by
  funext i j -- the rw below does not work without this line
  rw [transpose]
```
-/
ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "eqns"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `many  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

ParserDescr.node  `eqns  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "eqns"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `many  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

ParserDescr.node  `eqns  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "eqns"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `many  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

@[  attr_parser  1000  ]  public  meta  def eqns :  Lean.ParserDescr  :=  ParserDescr.node  `eqns  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  "eqns"  false  ParserDescr.unary  `many  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.const  `ppSpace  ParserDescr.const  `ident

Array Name
`eqnsAttribute

term.value: "Overrides the equation lemmas for a declaration to the provided list"

ref.pp: "Overrides the equation lemmas for a declaration to the provided list"

term.type: {α : Type} → (c : Prop) → [h : Decidable c] → α → α → α

expanded.pp: Eq  Syntax.isOfKind  __discr  `eqns  true

ref.pp:
match  (    Syntax.getArgs  __discr  .  mapM  fun  |  `( $names )  =>  no_error_if_unused%  some names |  _  =>  no_error_if_unused%  none  )  with  |  some names =>  have declName :=  __discr  ;  clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; do
      -- We used to be able to check here if equational lemmas have already been registered in
      -- Leans `eqsnExt`, but that has been removed in https://github.com/leanprover-community/mathlib4/issues/8519, so no warning in that case.
      -- Now we just hope that the `GetEqnsFn` registered below will always run before
      -- Lean’s.
      names.mapM realizeGlobalConstNoOverloadWithInfo
     |  none  =>  have  __discr  :=  Syntax.getArg  __discr  1  ;  clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; Lean.Elab.throwUnsupportedSyntax

term.type: {α β : Type} → {m : Type → Type} → [Monad m] → (α → m β) → Array α → m (Array β)
{α : Type} → α → List α → List α
